title: equisetum × mildeanum
intro: Equisetum × mildeanum, also known as the Midland horsetail, is a hybrid plant species within the Equisetum genus, characterized by its distinctive, hollow, and jointed stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. Consuming Equisetum × mildeanum has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing urinary tract infections, alleviating rheumatic pain, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
